title: business-hours-and-holidays-configurator inputs
description: Typed inputs for the business-hours-and-holidays-configurator runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

coverage_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "Global 24x5 support M-F; APAC 8-20 local; EMEA 8-19 local; Americas 7-18 Central; country-specific holidays" Required column: 'yes'.
coverage_summary.example: "Global 24x5 support M-F; APAC 8-20 local; EMEA 8-19 local; Americas 7-18 Central; country-specific holidays"

regions.description: Example from AGENT.md: list of regions to model; if omitted, derived from `coverage_summary` Required column: 'no'.
regions.example: list of regions to model; if omitted, derived from `coverage_summary`

audit_existing.description: Example from AGENT.md: default `true` — inventory current BH/Holidays before proposing Required column: 'no'.

holiday_source.description: Example from AGENT.md: `manual` | `ics-file-path` | `country-standard` (agent lists country codes to use) Required column: 'no'.
